news.t: You can invest in market winners and still lose big. Here's how to avoid the hit.
Vanguard index funds lose out to its own stock picking fund
How The Parts Add Up: The Vanguard Mid-Cap Growth ETF Headed For $166
How The Pieces Add Up: The Vanguard Mid-Cap Growth ETF Targets $165
How The Parts Add Up: The Vanguard Mid-Cap Growth ETF Headed For $165
Sum Up The Parts: The Vanguard Mid-Cap Growth ETF Could Be Worth $165
Look Under The Hood: The Vanguard Mid-Cap Growth ETF Has 11% Upside

holdings.infoBox: VOT is an equity ETF with a total of 134 individual holdings. The top holdings are Seagate Technology Holdings stock at 4.31%, Vertiv Holdings Co at 2.71%, Quanta Services at 2.39%, Howmet Aerospace at 2.33%, and Western Digital at 2.02%.

overview.description: The Vanguard Mid-Cap Growth ETF (VOT) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the CRSP US Mid Growth index. The fund tracks an index of mid-cap stocks in the US. Holdings are selected and weighed based on growth factors. VOT was launched on Aug 17, 2006 and is issued by Vanguard.

data.title: You can invest in market winners and still lose big. Here's how to avoid the hit.
data.text: Investors should think twice before picking an actively managed mutual fund according to its style category. By “style category,” I'm referring to the widely used method of grouping mutual funds accor...

data.title: Vanguard index funds lose out to its own stock picking fund
data.text: Over time you won't beat the market indexes, while you'll drive up trading and tax costs, it says. Hire a mutual-fund manager to pick stocks for you and you'll have to pay their hefty expenses as well...

data.title: Best Growth ETFs For September
data.text: In the last week, the markets have been challenged and have significantly pulled back from the all-time highs made. There's still a lot of volatility.
